notes: Party individual; IRI = party.uri; subtyped members:Party for named parties or left as members:PartyGrouping for :Independent
Used directly as the IRI of the members:PartyGrouping individual; no separate property needed

xsd:string; short code identifying the party (e.g. 'Fianna_Fáil'); domain members:PartyGrouping. For partyCode='Independent' the IRI corresponds to the :Independent named individual defined in members.owl.

Display name of the party (e.g. 'Fine Gael'); mapped to skos:prefLabel on the members:PartyGrouping individual. Mapping convention documented via skos:scopeNote added to members:PartyGrouping in members.owl.ttl.

Links the members:PartyGrouping individual (party.uri as subject) to the agents:HouseTerm individual (house.uri as object); domain members:PartyGrouping; range agents:HouseTerm. Property added to members.owl.ttl.
HouseTerm individual; IRI = house.uri; subtyped agents:DailTerm or agents:SeanadTerm based on house.houseCode
Used directly as the IRI of the agents:HouseTerm individual; no separate property needed
xsd:integer; ordinal term number (e.g. 31 for the 31st Dáil); domain agents:HouseTerm. Property added to agents.owl.ttl.
xsd:string; house slug (e.g. 'dail' or 'seanad'); domain agents:HouseTerm. Also determines class subtyping (agents:DailTerm or agents:SeanadTerm). Property added to agents.owl.ttl.

Display name of the house term (e.g. '31st Dáil'); mapped to skos:prefLabel on the agents:HouseTerm individual. Mapping convention documented via skos:scopeNote added to agents:HouseTerm in agents.owl.ttl.
